acceptance_criteria:
1. Field access tests (real name, rendered name, missing)
2. Reserved key tests (render, raw, __type__, __path__, __full_len__)
3. List index tests (within cap, beyond cap returns None)
4. Enumerate tests (list capped, class schema order, map sorted)
5. Truthiness tests (null, empty string, empty containers)
6. ERROR PATH: union ambiguity + field access returns error
7. ERROR PATH: unknown field on class returns None/undefined
8. ERROR PATH: index on non-list returns error
9. All edge cases covered
10. cargo test passes
title: Add JinjaPromptValue traversal unit tests
